name: codex-together
description: Use Gemini and Claude as optional sidecars for Codex research, summarization, critique, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate research and review to Gemini and Claude
interface.longDescription: Adds local MCP tools that let Codex call Gemini for search-grounded research and Claude for critique, review, and summarization when API keys are configured.
defaultPrompt: Use Gemini for search-grounded research and Claude for concise critique when it can reduce Codex token usage.
